settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize how RobosGig looks and feels.

theme.title: Choose your theme
theme.sub: Three modes — Light, Dark, or a frosted Glossier look inspired by Apple's liquid glass.

accent.title: Pick an accent
accent.sub: The accent colors badges, primary buttons, online dots, and other highlights.

language.title: Choose your language
language.sub: Used for the UI, email notifications, and AI assistants.

account.title: Profile, identity, payments
account.sub: Manage your profile information, identity verification, and payment methods.
